data.title: CGTN article discusses the Chinese private sector's role in the country's economic work in 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, CGTN released a report discussing the crucial contribution of the Chinese private sector to advancing the key objectives of the country's ongoing economic agenda. The article showcases the impressive accomplishments of private businesses in the past year, emphasizing their significant impact on the economy.

data.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma Co (NASDAQ: NAMS) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -65.79%, with EPS of $-0.63 vs. $-0.38 estimate. Revenue down $8.60 million.
data.description: NewAmsterdam Pharma Co (NASDAQ: NAMS) released its Q4 earnings on February 18, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -65.79%, with an EPS of $-0.63 compared to the expected $-0.38. Revenue decreased by $8.60 million compared to the previous year. In the previous quarter, the performance was... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Only 17% trust AI at workplace independently, 70% say human oversight needed, per Connext Global Survey.
data.description: In Honolulu, a recent survey revealed that AI is increasingly integrated into everyday work for many teams. However, findings from the Connext Global 2026 AI Oversight Survey Report show that the majority of users feel AI is not reliable without human involvement. Only 17% of U.S. adults utilizing AI in their work believe it can operate autonomously with minimal human input. Contrastingly, 70% of respondents indicated that they perceive reliability to stem from a combination of AI with either light review (35%) or dedicated human oversight (35%). This highlights that agentic autonomy is not yet the prevailing norm in most workplaces.

data.title: Trident completes $18.6M fundraising round.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion people, with more than half residing in urban areas. The study found that urban populations are growing at a rate of 1.8% per year, compared to rural areas at just 0.5%. It is projected that by 2050, nearly 70% of the world's population will live in cities. This rapid urbanization poses challenges for infrastructure, resource management, and social services. Experts suggest focusing on sustainable development and efficient city planning to accommodate this influx of urban dwellers.

data.title: Survey of 100 SMB finance leaders finds gap between AI hype and reality, revealing adoption barriers and implementation challenges in accounting processes.
data.description: New research conducted by Accounting Seed has revealed insights from a survey of more than 100 finance leaders in small to medium-sized businesses. The study identified obstacles to AI adoption, difficulties in implementation, and key accounting processes that have been significantly impacted by AI technology. The report, titled The State of AI, was published on Feb. 18, 2026, by the Columbia-based company.

data.title: Facilitron introduces national model to streamline K-12 public school facility use, enhancing access and accountability.
data.description: A recent update to the National Model School Board Facility Use Policy is aiding districts in streamlining access, managing costs, minimizing risks, and overseeing public areas with transparency and accountability. The policy, introduced in LOS GATOS, Calif. on Feb. 18, 2026, aims to establish consistent guidelines for facility usage across the nation. Facilitron, a prominent leader in managing public spaces, is at the forefront of implementing this policy, benefitting numerous districts. This development marks a significant achievement towards ensuring efficient and fair access to school facilities, reducing potential hazards, and enhancing governance practices.

data.title: Nobu Hospitality to open Nobu Beach Inn in Barbuda, adding to Nobu Barbuda restaurant, on scenic island. (Characters: 102)
data.description: A new hotel and residential project is set to be introduced on the picturesque Caribbean island of Barbuda, complementing the existing Nobu Barbuda restaurant. Nobu Hospitality, founded by Robert De Niro, has disclosed updated information about the development. The project is expected to enhance the island's offerings and cater to both visitors and residents.

data.title: Genomic Prediction names Santiago Munné, Ph.D., as Chief Scientific Officer, leading in embryo screening.
data.description: In Hackettstown, New Jersey, on February 18, 2026, Genomic Prediction, Inc., a leading company in advanced embryo screening, revealed Santiago Munné, Ph.D., as their new Chief Scientific Officer. Dr. Munné brings global expertise in reproductive genetics and preimplantation procedures to the company.

data.title: Hampton Bluff Capital Partners starts Atlanta-based RIA, $1.3B practice serving various clients, in partnership with Elevation Point.
data.description: A wealth management practice worth $1.3 billion, catering to entrepreneurs, high-net-worth individuals, family offices, foundations, and corporations, provides comprehensive services across balance sheets. The practice collaborates with Elevation Point to offer holistic services. This partnership is based in Minneapolis and was announced on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Marathon Asset Management loans $235M to Lone Star for senior housing portfolio refinance, 1,564 units involved.
data.description: In New York, Marathon Asset Management's Commercial Real Estate arm provided a $235 million senior mortgage loan to a Lone Star Real Estate Fund VI, L.P. affiliate for refinancing an 11-property mixed-acuity senior housing portfolio. The portfolio comprises 1,564 units across purpose-built senior housing communities. Most properties are in primary markets in Florida.

data.title: Harvey AI enhances patent litigation tools with 5 new workflow templates, following June 2025 launch.
data.description: A new Legal AI startup named Harvey has recently launched IP litigation workflows focusing on claim charts, invalidity contentions, and patent filings. This release comes after the successful launch of their Workflow Builder in June 2025. Users can now access these specialized workflows to enhance their legal processes. The startup aims to provide efficient and tailored solutions for intellectual property litigation. This update showcases Harvey's commitment to innovating in the legal tech industry.

data.title: RLJ Lodging Trust refinances debt through 2028, strengthens balance sheet, adds new term loan, upsizes an existing loan.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, RLJ Lodging Trust revealed that it has effectively refinanced all its debt due through 2028, marking a strategic move to stagger debt maturity dates and improve its financial position. The refinancing involves four components: extending its revolving credit facility, increasing and restructuring an existing term loan, introducing a new seven-year term loan, and refinancing its secured debt maturing in 2026. The Company's stock trades on NYSE under the symbol RLJ.

data.title: Westlake introduces Vertälla™ Accent Panel for Royal® and Exterior Portfolio® siding lines, adding modern aesthetic to homes.
data.description: Westlake Royal Building Products, a subsidiary of Westlake (NYSE: WLK), has introduced Vertälla, a new vertical accent panel for its Royal and Exterior Portfolio vinyl siding collections. This modern panel offers architectural depth and a fresh exterior look, distinguishing itself from conventional vinyl siding options. Vertälla is designed exclusively as an accent panel rather than for complete home coverage, enhancing curb appeal significantly.
Outcome of the ETP securityholders' meeting shows approval by 96% of stakeholders.

data.title: Parametric's Radius tech platform drives 19% asset growth in its first year, enhances data analysis, boosts trading volume.
data.description: In Seattle today, Parametric Portfolio Associates LLC (Parametric), under Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM), revealed that their exclusive integrated multi-asset technology platform, Radius, played a pivotal role in driving over 19% asset growth and account expansion within its inaugural year. Launched in January 2025, Radius combines various asset class capabilities to offer clients a tailored and smooth experience, concurrently enhancing tax efficiency.

data.title: Paysafe expands program for aspiring agents, offering training and support to sellers nationwide. (Word count: 13)
data.description: Paysafe (NYSE: PSFE) has expanded its U.S. Agent Recruitment Program in Jacksonville, Florida, now accepting applications from early career professionals and community-connected sellers aiming to establish a lasting career in payments as independent agents. The new agents will focus on aiding small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) in sectors like local retail, restaurants, healthcare, petroleum, and local services in accepting card payments. This initiative aims to provide opportunities for individuals interested in the payments sector while assisting various businesses in improving their payment capabilities.

data.title: Power Metallic reports significant copper equivalent grades at Lion with 20.40m at 4.11% CuEq in Hole 25-046 and 8.60m at 6.84% CuEq in Hole 25-045.
data.description: In Toronto on February 18, 2026, Power Metallic Mines Inc., known as Power Metallic, disclosed its latest assay results from the Summer-Fall Drilling Release 4 - Lion. Throughout the summer-fall 2025 drilling season, the Company has been active in this regard. Power Metallic's stocks are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange Venture (TSXV: PNPN), OTC Bulletin Board (OTCBB: PNPNF), and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (Frankfurt: IVV1).

data.title: Middle market businesses optimistic with 77% expressing confidence amid economic uncertainty; two-thirds planning M&A activity in 3 years.
data.description: In Cleveland on February 18, 2026, it was reported that despite economic uncertainty, 77% of businesses are feeling confident about their future performance. Two-thirds of these businesses are planning to engage in merger and acquisition activities within the next three years. The middle market sector is showing a significant increase in optimism.
